words.def: a unit of length equal to 1,760 yards or 5,280 feet; exactly 1609.344 meters
words.zh: n. 英里（1英里約合1609米, mile的複數形式）

words.def: a facial expression characterized by turning up the corners of the mouth; usually shows pleasure or amusement
words.zh: n. 微笑, 喜色, 笑容

words.def: a statement that deviates from or perverts the truth
words.zh: v. 躺臥（lie的第三人稱單數形式）

words.def: a statement that deviates from or perverts the truth
words.zh: n. 謊言, 假象, 位置
